title: 2026-02-27--self-update-full-codex-change-verification (PRD: /Users/d/product-orchestrator/docs/prd/2026-02-27--self-update-full-codex-change-verification.md)
description: Implement batch-aware self-update verification for stable+prerelease using changelog as source of truth, with PRD coverage gating and deterministic evidence.

title: SU-01 State schema v2 migration
description:
Scope: migrate pm self-update state from single-version to batch-aware schema while preserving latest processed baseline.

DoD:
- Automatic v1->v2 migration in self-update check path.
- Corrupt state fails closed with explicit error.
- Migration is idempotent and does not lose latest processed version.

comments.author: d
comments.text: Starting implementation: state schema v2 migration and compatibility handling.

title: SU-10 Update workflow policy docs
description:
Scope: align pm_workflow and related docs/smoke evidence with new batch verification semantics.

DoD:
- pm_workflow text matches implemented behavior.
- Smoke evidence doc updated or added with happy/unhappy/regression outcomes.
- No contradiction with AGENTS workflow rules.

title: SU-11 Manual QA Smoke Tests
description:
Scope: execute discovery-defined smoke plan across happy, unhappy, and regression scenarios after implementation and review iteration.

DoD:
- Manual QA run documented with pass/fail evidence.
- Browser-based checks executed where relevant.
- Any failures produce follow-up Beads tasks and rerun until pass or explicit user-accepted risk.

title: SU-02 Parse changelog entries (stable + prerelease)
description:
Scope: extract deterministic Codex change entries from changelog source-of-truth for stable and prerelease channels.

DoD:
- Deterministic deduped entry list with normalized versions.
- Malformed/empty payload returns explicit error.
- Parser does not depend on releases/latest ordering.

comments.author: d
comments.text: Starting implementation: deterministic changelog parsing for stable+prerelease entries.

title: SU-03 Reconciliation policy and feature toggles
description:
Scope: reconcile corroborative sources against changelog truth and add config toggles for prerelease-sensitive behavior.

DoD:
- Policy implemented: changelog source-of-truth, other sources corroborative-only.
- Strict mismatch mode can block advancement.
- Feature toggles for prerelease behavior are documented and tested.

title: SU-04 Compute pending batch and machine-readable check output
description:
Scope: compute one-batch pending set from processed baseline and emit machine-readable coverage context.

DoD:
- Batch includes stable+prerelease pending entries in deterministic order.
- Existing PLAN_TRIGGER contract is preserved.
- State stores pending batch metadata and evidence snapshot references.

title: SU-05 Enforce PRD coverage gate in self-update complete
description:
Scope: block completion unless PRD evidence covers every pending batch entry and approvals remain exact.

DoD:
- Approvals + empty Open Questions + PRD coverage all required.
- Missing coverage returns explicit missing-entry report.
- No state mutation when gate fails.

title: SU-06 Batch checkpoint advancement and rollback safety
description:
Scope: advance processed baseline to batch boundary only on successful completion and preserve rollback safeguards.

DoD:
- Pending batch clears after successful completion.
- Checkpoint commit remains scoped to state file.
- Backup/restore path works when commit fails.

title: SU-07 Extend check-path automated tests
description:
Scope: add tests for stable+prerelease batch detection and source-truth behavior.

DoD:
- Tests cover ordering, malformed source, mismatch handling, no-op reruns.
- test-pm-command.sh passes with new cases.

title: SU-08 Extend complete-path automated tests
description:
Scope: add tests for PRD coverage gate and fail-closed completion behavior.

DoD:
- Tests cover missing PRD coverage, invalid approvals, no-advance semantics, checkpoint isolation.
- test-pm-command.sh passes with new cases.

title: SU-09 Update PM skill self-update contract text
description:
Scope: update PM skill command routing text to reflect batch verification and PRD coverage gate behavior.

DoD:
- pm/SKILL.md documents stable+prerelease batch verification and changelog source-of-truth.
- Self-update manual invocation and plan-trigger behavior remain clear.
- Approval token requirements remain unchanged.

title: 2026-03-04--pm-token-telemetry-and-claude-runtime-conformance (PRD: docs/prd/2026-03-04--pm-token-telemetry-and-claude-runtime-conformance.md)
description: Epic for implementing PM token/timing telemetry and Claude-runtime conformance with fallback behavior.

title: Define telemetry event contract and identifier model
description:
Scope:
- Define workflow/task/step event schema and lineage IDs (workflow_run_id/task_id/step_id/parent_step_id/attempt).
- Define status/warning/error code taxonomy.
DoD:
- Contract doc maps 1:1 to PRD acceptance fields.
- Idempotency key format for step attempts is specified.

title: Update PM instructions and docs for routing and telemetry policy
description:
Scope:
- Update skill/instruction/readme/docs to explicitly describe Claude-default-with-fallback policy and telemetry requirements.
- Ensure wording is consistent across sources of truth.
DoD:
- All affected docs updated with explicit behavior and warning policy.
- No contradictory fail-fast guidance remains where fallback is intended.

title: Manual QA Smoke Tests for telemetry and fallback behavior
description:
Scope:
- Execute smoke plan across happy path, unhappy path, and regression for telemetry + routing fallback behavior.
- Include DB verification queries and warning-path checks.
DoD:
- Smoke evidence captured in docs/smoke with pass/fail outcomes.
- Any findings are converted to follow-up Beads tasks.

title: Add idempotency and dedupe safeguards for retrying step events
description:
Scope:
- Enforce idempotency key strategy for step attempt events.
- Prevent duplicate logical events under retries.
DoD:
- Duplicate retries do not produce duplicate logical step rows.
- Constraint/check behavior is tested.

title: Implement explicit usage_source and usage_status semantics
description:
Scope:
- Distinguish provider-reported usage from partial/estimated/missing usage.
- Surface usage status in telemetry and diagnostics.
DoD:
- Rows with missing provider usage are still valid and clearly marked.
- Diagnostics can filter by usage_source/usage_status.

title: Reconcile contract tests and scripts to prevent policy drift
description:
Scope:
- Align helper scripts/tests with fallback policy and runtime conformance checks.
- Ensure guardrails continue to emit explicit warnings/errors.
DoD:
- Contract tests cover fallback policy paths.
- No unresolved contradiction between scripts/tests/docs.

title: Create PostgreSQL telemetry schema, indexes, and migration/rollback
description:
Scope:
- Add DB schema for step-level telemetry events and lineage lookups.
- Add indexes for task timeline and workflow lineage queries.
DoD:
- Migration applies on empty DB and rollback works.
- Required indexes exist and are documented.

title: Implement non-blocking telemetry writer with warning emission
description:
Scope:
- Persist telemetry events without breaking workflow on DB write failure.
- Emit warning events with reason/remediation when persistence fails.
DoD:
- Workflow continues when writer errors.
- Warning event includes remediation metadata.

title: Implement runtime resolver: Claude default with codex fallback
description:
Scope:
- For roles configured as claude-code-mcp, attempt Claude invocation first.
- If unavailable/error, fallback to codex-native execution for that step.
DoD:
- Runtime decision output includes selected runtime and fallback reason when used.
- Remediation command is attached to warning path.

title: Align PM gate/runtime behavior with non-blocking fallback policy
description:
Scope:
- Replace hard-stop behavior where policy now requires fallback.
- Preserve explicit warning/error reporting in phase outputs.
DoD:
- Claude-unavailable scenarios continue via fallback path.
- No silent failures; warnings are emitted consistently.

title: Instrument PM lifecycle events across phases and subagent handoffs
description:
Scope:
- Emit start/end step telemetry for PM phases, subagents, and handoffs.
- Preserve parent/child linkage for timeline reconstruction.
DoD:
- Every executed step writes telemetry start/end records.
- parent_step_id lineage is valid for nested invocations.

title: Implement token normalization and arithmetic integrity handling
description:
Scope:
- Normalize prompt/completion/total token values from provider metadata.
- Handle partial/missing usage fields with explicit usage status markers.
DoD:
- total_tokens equals prompt+completion when both exist.
- Mismatches are flagged with explicit warning status.

title: Add diagnostic query surface for task timeline and workflow lineage
description:
Scope:
- Provide SQL view/query path for per-task per-step timeline.
- Provide lineage query by workflow_run_id with invocation relationships.
DoD:
- Single query returns ordered task timeline.
- Single query returns workflow lineage graph rows.

title: Add automated tests for conformance and telemetry completeness
description:
Scope:
- Add tests for Claude default/fallback behavior and warning semantics.
- Add tests for telemetry completeness, lineage, and token arithmetic.
DoD:
- Happy/unhappy/regression test cases pass.
- Failures are diagnosable and mapped to acceptance criteria.
